description: Migration freeze window, replay suite, and rollback plan rules

freeze_window.description: During a migration freeze, no new quests may be submitted or evaluated
rules: Freeze begins when a Migration quest at S19 enters EVALUATING state
During freeze: all quest submissions are queued but not processed
During freeze: all active evaluations are paused
During freeze: read access to all data remains available
During freeze: sealed receipts remain immutable and accessible
Freeze ends when migration quest reaches SEALED or FAILED state
If freeze exceeds duration_epochs, automatic rollback is triggered

replay_suite.description: Full replay validation required before migration commits
requirements: All SEALED quests must pass deterministic replay verification
Replay suite must cover at least 89% of all sealed receipts
Any replay failure triggers migration FAILED state and rollback
Replay suite runs in isolated sandbox environment
Replay results are logged in a MigrationReplayBundle

automatic_triggers: Freeze window exceeded without migration completion
Any HARD invariant violation detected during migration
3 or more replay failures in the suite
rollback_procedure: 2. Restore quest state to pre-freeze snapshot
3. Release all queued quest submissions for processing
5. Log rollback event with full diagnostic bundle
6. Notify all active players of rollback completion
7. Migration quest moves to FAILED state
